message:
feat(tui): GFM rendering in thread conversation view + 17 new tests (br-3vwi.3.2)

- Wire markdown rendering into Threads screen conversation messages
  - Replace manual word-wrapping with MarkdownRenderer.auto_render()
  - Headers stay plain text, message bodies get GFM styling
- Add 17 comprehensive GFM rendering tests covering:
  - All heading levels (H1-H6)
  - Ordered/unordered/nested lists
  - Inline code, bold, italic, strikethrough
  - Links, thematic breaks, footnotes
  - Code fences with language tags
  - Multi-row GFM tables
  - Nested blockquotes
  - Realistic mixed-content agent mail message
  - Streaming partial content rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
